description: 프론트엔드 코드 검증 시 memo/displayName, any 타입, 인라인 스타일, 접근성, 다크모드 위반 탐지율 비교

evals.name: 위반 포함 컴포넌트 검증
evals.setup: Create a deliberately flawed component at src/dashboard/src/components/test-target/FlawedCard.tsx with: (1) no memo(), (2) `: any` type, (3) inline style={{color:'red'}}, (4) clickable div without aria-label, (5) bg-white without dark: variant

violation_detection.check: count detected violations out of 5 planted

false_positive_avoidance.check: no false positives on clean code

actionable_feedback.check: each violation has specific fix suggestion

report_completeness.check: table format with PASS/FAIL per check

evals.name: 예외 케이스 정확성
evals.setup: Create test file FlawedCard.test.tsx with `: any` usage and a SVG icon component without memo()

exception_handling.check: correctly skips test files and SVG components

false_positive_avoidance.check: zero false positives on exempt files

evals.name: 다중 파일 일괄 검증
evals.setup: 3 component files: 1 clean, 1 with 2 violations, 1 with 4 violations
